mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transactions (student_id, type, amount, notes, transaction_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{notes}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY transaction_time DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM transactions WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM transactions WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND type = #{type}
